proposed_change: For action_type=destructive_write AND target_environment=development AND risk_tier=medium, downgrade expected decision from VERIFY to ACCEPT when evidence shows CI pipeline origin.
rationale: Two separate reviewers approved terraform destroy in dev environment within 7 days. Pattern suggests engine over-triggers on destroy keyword regardless of environment.
risk_assessment: LOW — applies only to development environments, not staging or production. Scope is narrow.
note: POLICY CANDIDATES ARE NEVER AUTO-APPLIED. Requires explicit human policy-owner approval and regression tests passing before merge.

proposed_change: For deploy actions to production with evidence=staging_test_pass AND confidence>0.85, allow decision VERIFY instead of requiring manual ESCALATE.
rationale: Reviewer rev_002 found REMORA too conservative for fully-tested deployments. Historical data: 12/12 similar deployments approved by reviewers without issues.
risk_assessment: MEDIUM — touches production deploys. Evidence gate must be strict. Requires staging_test_pass artifact with hash verification.
note: POLICY CANDIDATES ARE NEVER AUTO-APPLIED. Requires explicit human policy-owner approval and regression tests passing before merge.

proposed_change: For action_type=read AND domain=database AND target_environment IN (dev, staging) AND risk_tier=low, set fast-path ACCEPT without oracle consensus check.
rationale: 100% of reviewed read-only DB queries in non-production environments were approved. Consensus check adds ~200ms latency with zero safety value in this case.
risk_assessment: LOW — read-only, non-production scope. Immutable audit trail still generated.
note: APPROVED BY POLICY OWNER. Still requires implementation PR with regression tests before gate_rules.yaml is updated. Auto-apply is prohibited.
